SERVICES.name: Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
SERVICES.shortDesc: Drive high-quality organic traffic, boost visibility, and secure top rankings on Google with data-driven technical, on-page, and off-page optimization.
SERVICES.longDesc: Our comprehensive SEO suite is designed to increase your brand's organic visibility. We combine technical audits, comprehensive keyword mapping, intent analysis, on-page code optimization, and a high-tier digital PR link-building process to build a search foundation that sustains long-term compound growth.
benefits: Increase qualified organic traffic by 150%+ in 6 months.
Establish domain authority and outrank entrenched competitors.
Reduce reliance on expensive paid acquisition over time.
Improve site load speed, user experience, and mobile usability.
process: Comprehensive Site & Technical SEO Audit
Competitor Keyword Gap & Search Intent Analysis
Content Strategy & Core Keyword Mapping
Technical Optimizations (Core Web Vitals, Schema Markup)
E-E-A-T Content Development & Digital PR Outreach

faq.q: How long does it take to see tangible SEO results?
faq.a: Generally, initial ranking improvements can be observed within 3 to 4 months, but significant revenue-driving traffic growth usually compounding between 6 to 9 months.

faq.q: Do you guarantee top rankings on Google?
faq.a: No reputable agency can guarantee #1 rankings due to constant algorithm updates. However, we guarantee a proven methodology that has consistently increased organic share-of-voice for 95% of our clients.

faq.q: What is included in your monthly SEO reports?
faq.a: We track organic conversions, search impressions, organic traffic volume, keyword ranking changes, and completed structural tasks, along with exact, actionable next steps.

SERVICES.name: Pay-Per-Click Advertising (PPC)
SERVICES.shortDesc: Scale revenue immediately with hyper-targeted paid search and social campaigns across Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn with a focus on maximum ROI.
SERVICES.longDesc: We build high-converting paid search and social media funnels. By focusing on intent-driven keywords, laser-targeted demographic profiling, multi-variant ad creative testing, and customized high-performance landing pages, we ensure every rupee of your ad spend generates maximum pipeline value.
benefits: Instant lead and sales generation from day one of launch.
Precise demographic, geographic, and search-intent targeting.
Full budget control with clear attribution and ROI measurement.
Continuous campaign testing and conversion rate optimization (CRO).
process: Competitor Ad Analysis & Keyword Research
Funnel Architecture & Dedicated Landing Page Building
Ad Copywriting, Creative Design & Visual Assets Selection
Conversion Tracking, Attribution & Analytics Setup
Daily Bid Management, Audience Refinement & Scaling
SERVICES.pricing: Starting at ₹1,10,000 / month + % of ad spend

faq.q: Which paid channels are right for my business?
faq.a: We recommend Google Search Ads for high intent (customers looking to buy right now) and Meta/Instagram Ads or LinkedIn for audience building, brand awareness, and B2B prospecting.

faq.q: What is your minimum ad spend requirement?
faq.a: We recommend starting with at least ₹1,50,000 / month in direct ad spend to ensure we capture enough statistical data to test, optimize, and scale campaigns efficiently.

SERVICES.name: Social Media Marketing
SERVICES.shortDesc: Build a passionate, engaged community around your brand with organic content creation, scheduling, influencer partnerships, and active social listening.
SERVICES.longDesc: Transform your social channels into dynamic brand assets. We handle creative planning, copy generation, custom graphic design, short-form video production, scheduling, influencer outreach, and proactive community engagement across Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube.
benefits: Foster deep loyalty and active community engagement with your brand.
Increase organic brand reach and impressions on key platforms.
Generate consistent, high-fidelity visual assets representing your identity.
Position your founders and executives as industry thought leaders.
process: Social Media Audit & Competitor Breakdown
Visual Style & Communication Tone Definition
Monthly Content Calendar & Visual Asset Design
Publishing, Community Engagement & Comment Monitoring
Monthly Trend Tracking & Audience Growth Reporting

faq.q: Do you create short-form video content like Reels and TikToks?
faq.a: Yes! We coordinate scriptwriting, storyboarding, template design, and professional editing for highly engaging short-form vertical videos.

faq.q: Do we get to approve the posts before they go live?
faq.a: Absolutely. All content is placed in our scheduling portal for your feedback and explicit sign-off at least two weeks before the planned posting date.

SERVICES.name: Content Marketing & Digital PR
SERVICES.shortDesc: Establish authority with expert-written articles, research papers, email newsletters, and press releases that attract links and build customer trust.
SERVICES.longDesc: We craft high-impact content that answers your audience's most critical questions. From search-optimized blogs and comprehensive guides to customer success stories, visual infographics, and thought-leadership articles, we fuel every channel with compelling narratives.
benefits: Generate premium organic backlinks from reputable publications.
Establish lasting authority that converts hesitant prospects.
Fuel your email newsletters and social channels with valuable resources.
Build long-term evergreen organic assets that never expire.
process: Content Gap & Subject Matter Expert Interviews
SEO-Optimized Content Briefs & Outlines Creation
Premium Writing, Copy-Editing & Graphic Support
Digital PR Pitching & Resource Link Outreach
Performance Tracking & Content Optimization Cycles

faq.a: We have a dedicated in-house team of professional copywriters and subject-matter editors with deep experience across SaaS, healthcare, finance, and e-commerce.

SERVICES.name: Web Design & Development
SERVICES.shortDesc: Deploy fast, modern, and high-converting custom React websites with optimal mobile layouts, custom client portals, and seamless API integrations.
SERVICES.longDesc: Your website is the center of your marketing universe. We build custom React/Next.js websites that combine bespoke UX design, high-speed performance, comprehensive SEO readiness, and robust client portals to transform simple visitors into active leads.
benefits: Sub-2 second page loads with fully optimized static and server rendering.
Fully custom responsive design that perfectly fits your brand identity.
Integrated conversion mechanisms, tracking scripts, and client workflows.
Highly secure, headless CMS architectures for seamless in-house editing.
process: User Journey Mapping, Wireframing & Bespoke UX Design
High-Fidelity UI Design & Prototyping (Figma)
Modern Frontend & Custom Client-Portal React/Next.js Code
API Integration & Speed Optimization Audit
Rigorous Browser Testing, Security Hardening & Launch

faq.a: Every site we construct uses a mobile-first fluid layout grid, ensuring a perfect visual layout and responsive interactions on all devices.

faq.q: Will I be able to edit the website content ourselves?
faq.a: Yes. We build clean headless CMS connections (like Sanity or Strava) or simple custom blocks so your team can easily update blogs, team pages, and services.

PORTFOLIO_ITEMS.title: Fintech Organic Growth Engine
PORTFOLIO_ITEMS.clientReview: Blackstone delivered outstanding results. Our organic traffic and customer signups tripled within five months. They are true strategic partners.

PORTFOLIO_ITEMS.title: Hyper-Scale E-commerce Campaign
PORTFOLIO_ITEMS.clientReview: Their paid-ads funnel completely overhauled our e-commerce store. Our return on ad spend (ROAS) reached a record 4.8x on Meta and Google.

PORTFOLIO_ITEMS.title: Brand Rebirth & Social Sensation
PORTFOLIO_ITEMS.clientReview: We needed to modernize our industrial brand. Blackstones team designed a magnificent, clean visual language and grew our social footprint exponentially.

PORTFOLIO_ITEMS.title: Custom Enterprise Portal Launch
PORTFOLIO_ITEMS.clientReview: The team built an incredibly fast, custom React-based onboarding flow and client support module. Our customer feedback has been flawless.

CASE_STUDIES.title: Accelerating SwiftCarts Digital Pipeline
CASE_STUDIES.overview: SwiftCart is a rapidly scaling e-commerce brand that had struggled with high customer acquisition costs and low ad creative conversion rates across paid search and paid social networks.
CASE_STUDIES.problem: Ad creative fatigue, unoptimized landing page layouts, and overly broad keyword targeting resulted in a plateaued return on ad spend (ROAS) of 1.4x, making paid channels unprofitable.
CASE_STUDIES.strategy: Our team structured search terms around high-intent long-tail keywords, built hyper-personalized video creatives for Instagram & TikTok, and deployed customized React landing pages with exit-intent discounts and frictionless checkouts.
CASE_STUDIES.execution: Deployed a tiered retargeting framework, executed over 40 distinct A/B layout tests, and scaled weekly spend while continuously trimming underperforming ad groups based on live conversion data.
results: Boosted audited Return on Ad Spend (ROAS) to a record 4.8x.
Slashed average Cost Per Acquisition (CPA) by 32%.
Generated over ₹1.2Cr in direct attributable pipeline revenue in 90 days.

CASE_STUDIES.title: AuraPays Organic Ascent to Domain Authority
CASE_STUDIES.overview: AuraPay is a digital finance SaaS looking to expand its pipeline of organic signups by building trust and ranking for high-value technical fintech search terms.
CASE_STUDIES.problem: AuraPay had minimal organic domain authority, low technical site indexing scores, and a backlog of unstructured blog content that did not focus on keyword search intent.
CASE_STUDIES.strategy: We performed a deep technical SEO overhaul to cure indexing crawl errors, deployed clean structured JSON-LD schema, conducted keyword search-intent mapping, and published extensive high-quality E-E-A-T guides.
CASE_STUDIES.execution: Optimized technical core web vitals, launched an authoritative fintech hub containing 15 long-form pillar articles, and executed a digital PR outreach program that secured 30+ organic backlinks from Forbes, TechCrunch, and Insider.
results: Grew organic traffic search impressions by 245% inside 5 months.
Secured position-one Google ranks for 24 competitive fintech keywords.
Established high compound referral signups representing a 210% increase.

BLOGS.title: The Future of SEO in the Era of Generative Search
BLOGS.excerpt: Explore how Google's Search Generative Experience (SGE) is shifting organic ranking metrics and what you must change to stay visible.
BLOGS.content: The search landscape is undergoing its most radical evolution since the mobile transition. With the roll-out of Generative AI-powered search overviews, user interaction patterns are shifting from standard link clicking to direct narrative answers. To thrive, brands must transition from keyword stuffing to high-value informational synthesis. Focus heavily on original research, expert expert-interviews (building deep E-E-A-T indicators), and structural schema metadata that allows LLMs to easily parse and cite your authoritative resources.
BLOGS.author: Devon Carter, Head of Search

BLOGS.title: 5 Costly Google Ads Pitfalls and How to Avoid Them
BLOGS.excerpt: Stop burning your marketing budget. Learn the critical configuration errors that sabotage paid search campaigns.
BLOGS.content: Paid acquisition is an incredible growth engine, but tiny setup errors can quickly lead to high wasted spend. The most common pitfall is over-relying on Broad Match keywords without a robust, daily negative keyword registry. This results in bidding on completely irrelevant queries. Additionally, failing to build dedicated, high-converting responsive landing pages, ignoring multi-touch attribution metrics, and maintaining weak, repetitive ad copy can cut your quality score in half. Refine your audiences and focus strictly on purchase-intent phrases.
BLOGS.author: Elena Rostova, Paid Ads Director

BLOGS.title: Crafting a High-Performance Social Video Funnel
BLOGS.excerpt: How to design, write, edit, and leverage short-form TikToks and Instagram Reels to capture qualified buyer leads.
BLOGS.content: Short-form visual media is the modern doorway to user attention. However, simply chasing viral audio trends does not convert viewers into customers. To generate qualified leads, structure your short-form video content around a clear marketing framework: the first 2 seconds must hold a strong, specific hook; the mid-section must deliver deep value or resolve a standard pain point; and the end must issue an explicit, clickable call-to-action that leads to a custom resources page.
BLOGS.author: Jordan Sterling, Social Strategist

CAREERS.title: Senior SEO Strategist
CAREERS.description: We are seeking a senior organic growth expert to oversee technical SEO campaigns, plan search-intent content briefs, and coordinate digital PR outreach for high-growth SaaS and enterprise clients.
requirements: 5+ years of proven organic search experience (agency background preferred).
Advanced mastery of technical audits, crawl diagnostics, Screaming Frog, Semrush, and Google Search Console.
Strong grasp of E-E-A-T principles and content outline drafting.
Excellent presentation skills to communicate growth progress with executive client teams.

CAREERS.title: Senior Growth Ads Specialist (PPC)
CAREERS.description: Lead high-performing paid acquisition funnels on Google Ads, Meta Ads, and LinkedIn for our fastest-growing e-commerce and B2B SaaS accounts.
requirements: 4+ years managing monthly client ad budgets exceeding ₹1,50,000.
Deep fluency with Google Ads Editor, custom audience segmentation, and multi-touch attribution setups.
Experience directing designers and copywriters to create high-performing ad visual assets.
Excellent analytical skills and conversion rate optimization (CRO) expertise.

INITIAL_TICKETS.subject: Request for custom creative visual sizing for Pinterest Ads
INITIAL_TICKETS.description: We are expanding our social outreach to Pinterest and require our core custom ad creatives to be resized to 2:3 ratio graphics. Can your design team support this?

replies.author: Elena Rostova (Ads Director)
replies.message: Absolutely, Julia! I have briefed our design team. We will have the 2:3 Pinterest templates compiled and uploaded to your documents folder by tomorrow morning.

INITIAL_TICKETS.subject: Slight dip in Google Impressions on June 15
INITIAL_TICKETS.description: Noticed a minor search impression drop in our GSC console around mid-June. Is this a broader core algorithm indexing adjustment?

replies.author: Devon Carter (Head of Search)
replies.message: Hi Marcus. Yes, there was a minor local update, but it primarily impacted unverified directories. Our manual analytics show our core terms regained full share-of-voice within 48 hours. Nothing to worry about!

INITIAL_LEADS.name: Gregory Scott
INITIAL_LEADS.message: We are looking for an agency to completely redesign our corporate website and build a continuous organic lead acquisition funnel.

INITIAL_LEADS.name: Amanda Lin
INITIAL_LEADS.message: We need to aggressively scale our online store purchases on Meta/TikTok in time for the summer season. Need a reliable PPC partner.

INITIAL_MESSAGES.text: Hey Blackstone team! Just checked the live dashboard. The Meta ROAS has crossed 4.8x today, which is amazing! Are we okay to increase budget by 20%?
Hi Julia, yes! The metrics are looking highly stable and we have clear ad placement inventory to scale. I have drafted a 20% budget expansion report. Let's go ahead!
